briefs.title: BC Development Cost Charge Instalment Rules Tightened for Developers Starting January 2026
briefs.summary: Starting Jan 1, 2026, BC developers paying development cost charges (fees charged by transit authorities when land is developed) in instalments must pay 25% upfront at permit approval and the rest within 4 years or 15 days after all occupancy permits are satisfied.
briefs.action_required: Review your development project timelines and ensure surety bonds or letters of credit are ready for January 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Development Cost Charge instalment rules take effect

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Transportation & Logistics
